name: python3-myst-parser
title: python3-myst-parser
summary: rich and extensible flavor of Markdown for technical docs
description:
rich and extensible flavor of Markdown for technical docs
MyST is a flavor of markdown that is designed for simplicity, flexibility,
and extensibility. This package include a reference implementation of
MyST Markdown, as well as a collection of tools to support working with MyST
in Python and Sphinx.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for myst-anchors.
arguments.raw: -anchors  Option present in package usage line for myst-anchors.

commands.name: myst-inv
commands.description: usage: myst-inv [-h] [-d DOMAIN] [-o TYPE] [-n NAME] [-l LOC] [-f {yaml,json}]

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use myst-anchors because rich and extensible flavor of Markdown for technical docs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use myst-anchors as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `myst-anchors [options] [args]` as documented upstream for myst-anchors.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair myst-anchors with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `myst-anchors --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -anchors
arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for myst-anchors.
